'''Dack''', also known as '''Tymmo''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] candidate for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
His candidacy was due to a rare occurrence of winning every major blob race on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]], though he had actually secretly implanted a chip into the blobs to incite their flight or fight instincts. He cheated to stay away from his wife, the [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] of [[Dargul]], [[Mistal]]; even in that venture he cheated, he used his computer skills to make himself the perfect choice for the Duchess. Though he was caught cheating on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]] by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], which was a crime punishable by [[Death/Legends|death]] on Umgul, he willingly chose to return to the Duchess over death (although it appeared to be a close decision). He along with the Duchess attended the playing of the [[Cathedral of Winds/Legends|Cathedral of Winds]] on [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]] as invited dignitaries (he clearly resented his position as her consort).
